newsSinceJun6: No discrete material announcement found since June 6. Today's +9.05% (to HKD 255.4, YTD +387%) appears flow/momentum-driven, extending the hollow-core fiber rerating wave. Underlying catalysts are stale: HollowBand hollow-core fiber brand launch (0.04 dB/km record, 31% lower latency) at MWC/OFC in March, China Telecom/China Mobile/China Unicom hollow-core procurement wins (2025-Jan 2026), fiber price hikes and sector-wide order boom, and a Morgan Stanley target raise to HKD 230 that price has already exceeded by ~11%.

sources.label: Light Reading - YOFC AI-2030 strategy / hollow-core at MWC 2026
Sina Finance - YOFC hollow-core orders / sole-winner coverage (Mar 2026)

verdicts.rankRationale: Another +9% single-day melt-up on no identifiable new fundamental news since June 6 further compresses residual alpha on a crowding-sensitive alpha list; the hollow-core story is real but fully discovered, with price now ~11% above Morgan Stanley's already-raised HKD 230 target.
verdicts.bull: YOFC is the genuine hollow-core fiber leader (0.04 dB/km HollowBand, China Telecom/Mobile/Unicom wins) and hollow-core DCI for AI clusters could be a multi-year volume-and-price upcycle the market still underestimates in magnitude.
verdicts.neutral: Fundamental momentum (fiber price hikes, full order books) is intact, but at +387% YTD and ~$39B cap the name now trades as a recognized AI-optics proxy; alpha from here depends on hollow-core orders scaling faster than consensus, not on discovery.
verdicts.bear: A flow-driven parabolic move atop a 387% YTD run invites violent mean reversion; conventional fiber remains cyclical and commoditized, and any pause in hollow-core procurement tenders or hyperscaler testing would deflate the premium quickly.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: New large-scale hollow-core fiber tenders or hyperscaler/DCI commercial contracts converting the HollowBand lead into booked revenue (1H26 results, August).
verdicts.primaryRisk: Momentum unwind in a crowded, fully-rerated name if hollow-core order flow or fiber pricing disappoints versus now-elevated expectations.
